name: fundingapp
description: FundingApp — a giving platform for verified, admitted MBA students from lower-income countries. Funds go directly to the business school.

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install && npm run setup
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run setup && npm --prefix apps/api run prisma:migrate
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
